channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Bloodborne animated movie announced
item.content:encoded:
• PlayStation

R-rated film will remain "very true" to the spirit of Bloodborne.

Sony Pictures is developing an R-rated animated movie adaptation of the Bloodborne game, the company announced. It is co-produced by PlayStation Productions, Lyrical Animation, and Sean McLoughlin (jacksepticeye), and co-financed with Sony Pictures by Lyrical Animation parent company Lyrical Media.

At CinemaCon 2026, where the movie was announced, Sony Pictures Entertainment Motion Picture Group president Sanford Panitch said the film will remain “very true” to spirit of Bloodborne.

The Bloodborne game is developed by FromSoftware and published by Sony Interactive Entertainment, which is a subsidiary of Sony Pictures parent company Sony Group. It launched for PlayStation 4 on March 24, 2015.

Thanks, Variety.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/bloodborne-animated-movie-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Shikhondo: Blue Pieta for PC launches May 18
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Console versions due out at a later date.

Fantasy bullet hell shoot ’em up game Shikhondo: Blue Pieta will launch for PC via Steam and Stove on May 18, followed by PlayStation 5, Switch 2, and Switch at a later date, publisher CFK and developer DeerFarm announced. It will support English, Korean, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese language options.

Here is an overview of the game, via CFK:

About

Shikhondo: Blue Pieta is a side-scrolling fantasy bullet hell—a series first. It follows Shikhondo: Youkai Rampage (Steam: April 2024, Nintendo Switch: May 2025), moving the stage to a foreign city where a rookie grim reaper and a vampire hunter cross paths.

Full voice acting throughout. Ultra-wide support up to 32:9.

What’s New

The series goes side-scrolling for the first time. The stages—a metropolis, an amusement park, a subway station—are modern spaces that feel lived-in and slightly off. The enemies come from the legends of a different world.

The Soul Collect system returns, evolved. Graze bullets to charge your gauge. Trigger it: every bullet on screen becomes a score pickup, 2x multiplier. Have a bomb left? Spend it for a second stage—4x multiplier, attacks boosted. The closer you play to the edge, the more you get out of it.

Counter Bomb is new to the series. Get hit, and the screen flashes—eight frames to press the bomb button. Do it in time: no damage, and you either pop Soul Collect Mode or burn a bomb. Near-death is a decision now.

Counter Bomb requires a full Soul Gauge or at least one available bomb.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/shikhondo-blue-pieta-for-pc-launches-may-18
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Overwatch for Switch 2 launches April 14
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Due out alongside start of Season 2: Summit.

The Switch 2 version of Overwatch, formerly Overwatch 2, will launch on April 14, Blizzard Entertainment announced.

Compared to the Switch version, the Switch 2 version will offer better visuals, higher fidelity audio, and up to 60 frames per second in both docked and handheld modes.

Overwatch is currently available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam and Battle.net.

The game’s second season, “Summit,” will start alongside the Switch 2 version’s release. It features the following content:

  • Operation: Grand Mesa New Hero Event
  • Antarctic Peninsula Rework
  • Post-Match Accolades
  • Mythic Skins
  • Stadium Updates
    • New Hero: Ramattra
    • Lijiang Night Market
    • Juno Rework
    • New Hero: Jetpack Cat (midseason)
  • Perks Refresh (mini)
  • 10th Year Anniversary (midseason)
  • Starter Pack
  • Ultimate Battle Pass Skins
  • Fairy Theme Battle Pass
  • New Collaboration

Further details are available at the Overwatch official website.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/overwatch-for-switch-2-launches-april-14
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
